home.hero_subtitle: We look forward to providing you with the most professional massage and care services
home.treatments_subtitle: Discover the care plan that suits you — rejuvenate from the inside out.

foot_reflex.name: Foot Reflexology
foot_reflex.description: Stimulates reflex zones on both feet to regulate corresponding organs throughout the body. Effectively improves blood circulation, relieves leg heaviness, and enhances sleep quality — the top choice for busy urbanites.

body_acupoint.name: Full Body Acupressure
body_acupoint.description: Targets shoulder, neck, and back pain caused by prolonged poor posture. Therapists use finger pressure and kneading techniques to precisely locate acupoints, deeply releasing tense muscles and unblocking meridians.

lymph.name: Lymphatic Drainage Massage
lymph.description: Uses gentle, rhythmic techniques to guide lymph flow and accelerate the metabolism of excess fluids and waste. Helps reduce body swelling, boost immune function, and improve overall constitution.

prenatal.name: Prenatal Relaxation Massage
prenatal.description: Gentle massage designed for expectant mothers. Relieves common pregnancy discomforts including lower limb swelling, lumbar pressure, and muscle cramps, with therapists using safe positioning throughout.

nail.name: Shanghai-Style Nail Care
nail.description: Inheriting authentic Shanghai nail craft, using professional tools to meticulously treat calluses, dead skin, and nail issues. More than cosmetic — it's deep cleansing and maintenance for foot health.

guasha.name: Gua Sha Therapy
guasha.description: Stimulates meridians on the body surface to expel accumulated toxins and heat. Effectively relieves early cold symptoms, neck and shoulder stiffness, and heatstroke, boosting the body's resistance.

services.title: Service Price List
services.subtitle: Pricing
services.voucher_note: Cash vouchers are non-refundable. Valid for 18 months from date of purchase.

about.title: About Us
about.story_p1: Lively Foot has been serving Happy Valley for over a decade, focused on one thing: delivering the most effective and deeply relaxing massage experience.
about.story_p2: We specialize in Chinese foot reflexology and full body massage, led by senior therapists with over ten years of experience. Our exclusive techniques reach deep into your fatigue points, effectively relieving lower back pain, shoulder and neck stiffness. We go beyond relaxation — we help your body restore balance and health.
about.story_p3: Our space is clean, comfortable, and designed for your peace of mind. If you're looking for professional massage that truly addresses body fatigue, Lively Foot is your first choice. Call us to book.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Answers to your questions about our massage services

booking.q: Do I need to book in advance?
booking.a: We recommend booking via WhatsApp or phone to ensure a therapist is available for your preferred time. Walk-ins are welcome subject to availability.

duration.q: How long are the massage sessions?
duration.a: We offer 50-minute, 75-minute, and 100-minute sessions. Choose the duration that best suits your needs.

prenatal.q: Can pregnant women get a massage?
prenatal.a: Yes. We offer a dedicated prenatal massage service. Our therapists use safe positioning to help expectant mothers relieve pregnancy discomforts. We recommend waiting until after the first trimester.

voucher.a: Yes, cash vouchers are non-named and can be shared with family and friends. Vouchers are non-refundable and valid for 18 months from the date of purchase.

hours.a: We are open daily from 10:00 AM to 12:00 midnight.

location.q: How do I get to your location?
location.a: We are located at 5/F & Cockloft, King Cheung Mansion, King Kwong Street, Happy Valley. Take the tram to Happy Valley terminus — we're about a 3-minute walk away.
